thought.text: I found a reference to GitHub in the fsmonitor-watchman sample file, but it's just a comment about using watchman with Git for performance improvements. Let me check if there are any other files that might contain information about the README or where it might be located.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "find /workspace/project -type f | xargs grep -l \"README\" 2>/dev/null", "is_input": "false", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Search for references to README in all files"}

summary: Search for references to README in all files
